title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework (TypeScript, Node.js 22 LTS) with SQLite persistence, Vitest testing, and a modular architecture: agent core, commands, providers, tools, memory, sessions, and desktop layers. Key subdirectories: src/agent, src/cli, src/commands, src/desktop, src/memory, src/persistence, src/providers, src/sessions, src/tools, with tests in tests/unit, integration, contract.
